name: Model Router
description: Tiered model router for OpenClaw — picks the cheapest sufficient model per turn via heuristic + semantic kNN classification. Defaults route across DeepSeek V4 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, and Claude Opus 4.6 (cleanly monotonic cost ladder).

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Master kill switch. When false the before_model_resolve hook returns no override — gateway behavior is identical to the plugin being uninstalled.

liveRouting.label: Live Routing (GO-LIVE flag)
liveRouting.help: When false (default), the plugin runs in observability-only mode — decisions are computed and written to the WAL but no modelOverride is returned. When true, the plugin returns real { modelOverride, providerOverride } and the gateway honors them. Pairs with strict tier validation: enabling this requires every tier's provider/model to resolve in the gateway's models.providers config, otherwise the plugin throws at register-time.

defaultTier.label: Default Tier
defaultTier.help: Tier picked under uncertainty (low classifier confidence). T1 (DeepSeek V4 Pro) recommended; balances cost and quality.

tiers.T0.provider.label: T0 Provider
tiers.T0.provider.help: Provider for the cheapest tier. Default 'deepseek' for V4 Flash; switch to 'ollama' if you've pulled a local chat model.

tiers.T0.model.label: T0 Model
tiers.T0.model.help: Cheapest model in the ladder. Default 'deepseek-v4-flash' (~$0.10-0.30/MTok). Picked only when both heuristic and semantic agree the prompt is trivial with confidence >0.80.

tiers.T0.url.label: T0 URL
tiers.T0.url.help: Optional. Loopback only (http://localhost:...) or https://. Plaintext non-loopback URLs are refused. Required only when T0 provider is 'ollama'.

tiers.T1.provider.label: T1 Provider
tiers.T1.provider.help: Provider for the default tier (handles the largest share of traffic). Default 'deepseek' for V4 Pro.

tiers.T1.model.label: T1 Model
tiers.T1.model.help: Default-tier model. Default 'deepseek-v4-pro' (~$1-3/MTok). Used for everything not confidently classified elsewhere.

tiers.T2.provider.label: T2 Provider
tiers.T2.provider.help: Provider for the reasoning/escalation tier. Default 'google' for Gemini 3.1 Pro.

tiers.T2.model.label: T2 Model
tiers.T2.model.help: Reasoning-tier model. Default 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview' ($2/$12 per MTok). Picked on heuristic escalate keywords, code fences, or semantic vote for complex reasoning.

tiers.T3.provider.label: T3 Provider
tiers.T3.provider.help: Provider for long-context / multimodal / failover. Default 'anthropic' for Opus 4.6.

tiers.T3.model.label: T3 Model
tiers.T3.model.help: Top-tier model. Default 'claude-opus-4-6' ($5/$25 per MTok). Reached only via hard-escalation rules: prompts > longContextThreshold tokens, multimodal attachments, or T2 failover.

classifier.longContextThreshold.label: Long-Context Threshold (tokens)
classifier.longContextThreshold.help: Prompts estimated above this many tokens are unconditionally routed to T3 (Gemini).

classifier.heuristics.maxTrivialChars.label: Max Trivial Chars
classifier.heuristics.maxTrivialChars.help: Prompts shorter than this are eligible for T0 downgrade (still requires semantic agreement).

classifier.heuristics.escalateLengthChar.label: Escalate Length (chars)
classifier.heuristics.escalateLengthChar.help: Prompts longer than this are escalated to T2 even without keyword hits.

classifier.heuristics.trivialPatterns.label: Trivial Patterns (regex[])
classifier.heuristics.trivialPatterns.help: JS regex strings; a match marks the prompt as a T0 candidate.

classifier.heuristics.escalatePatterns.label: Escalate Patterns (regex[])
classifier.heuristics.escalatePatterns.help: JS regex strings; a match escalates the prompt to T2.

classifier.semantic.enabled.label: Semantic Classifier
classifier.semantic.enabled.help: Adds ~30ms via Ollama embed + Qdrant kNN. Strongly recommended once exemplars are seeded.

classifier.semantic.qdrant.url.label: Qdrant URL
classifier.semantic.qdrant.url.help: Same Qdrant instance as openclaw-memory-rag is fine — collections are namespaced.

classifier.semantic.qdrant.collection.label: Exemplar Collection
classifier.semantic.qdrant.collection.help: Versioned collection name. Bump suffix when changing embedding model/dim.

classifier.semantic.embeddings.model.label: Embedding Model
classifier.semantic.embeddings.model.help: Must be pulled in Ollama: `ollama pull mxbai-embed-large`.

classifier.semantic.topK.label: Top-K Exemplars
classifier.semantic.topK.help: Number of exemplars considered in the weighted vote.

classifier.semantic.marginThreshold.label: Confidence Margin
classifier.semantic.marginThreshold.help: Below this, the router falls back to the prior tier (sticky behavior).

classifier.semantic.stickyPriorBoost.label: Sticky Prior Boost
classifier.semantic.stickyPriorBoost.help: Multiplier on the prior tier's vote weight. >1 biases toward staying on the same tier turn-to-turn.

failover.windowSize.label: Failover Window
failover.windowSize.help: Number of recent calls considered for the per-provider error rate.

failover.errorRateThreshold.label: Error Rate Threshold
failover.errorRateThreshold.help: Fraction of failures that trips the breaker.

failover.consecutiveFailureThreshold.label: Consecutive Failures
failover.consecutiveFailureThreshold.help: Hard count of back-to-back failures that trips the breaker.

failover.cooldownMs.label: Cooldown (ms)
failover.cooldownMs.help: How long a tripped breaker stays open before a probe call is allowed.

observability.walDir.label: WAL Directory
observability.walDir.help: Where decision JSONL files are written. Hashed prompts only — never raw text.

observability.logDecisions.label: Log Decisions
observability.logDecisions.help: When false, no decision rows are written (router still routes; you just lose the audit trail).

observability.sampleRate.label: Decision Sample Rate
observability.sampleRate.help: Fraction of decisions written to the WAL. 1.0 = all decisions; lower for high-traffic deployments.
